title: jurinea kuraminensis
intro: Jurinea kuraminensis, also known as Kuramin Jurinea or Bitter Jurinea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Jurinea kuraminensis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Jurinea kuraminensis can be prepared as herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Central Asia.
